Hotpot AI

★★★★☆ 100 credits Paid from: From $9.99/month

Visit official site →

Hotpot AI is an AI image generator that's easy to use, helping you create stunning images quickly.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: 100 credits
  • Reset: Resets monthly
  • Watermark: 无
  • Commercial: Yes

Key Features

  • Text-to-image generation
  • Multiple art style options
  • Fast image generation
  • Simple user-friendly interface
  • Image editing support

Pros

  • Very easy to use
  • Generates quickly
  • Good image quality

Cons

  • Free credits are limited
  • Advanced features require payment

Tips

  • Try different prompts for better results
  • Use free credits to test the tool first
